variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2120 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59652
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2120 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 59652. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2120 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AS2522 Air Filter/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO59652
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AS2522 air oil separator prevents oil build-up, protects against detonation, and minimizes oil loss which equates to reduced maintenance and more consistent performance.
